full_text:
Wu Kuang еҗіеҢЎ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Kuang (еҗіеҢЎ). Officer of He Jin, he aided Yuan Shu in breaking the gates and killed He Miao. Wu Kuang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
